title: JinKaizenn's Samurai's
description:
Wanna be a Samurai? Download this modpack then!

This modpack features new armour, weapons, world generation and animations to your game. A true Samurai experience!
body:
Wanna be a Samurai? Download this modpack then!

This modpack features new armour, weapons, world generation and animations to your game. A true Samurai experience!
JinKaizenn's Samurai's transports players to the era of feudal Japan, adding a rich, immersive samurai theme to Minecraft. This mod introduces a variety of traditional samurai elements, including new weapons, armor, and structures, as well as unique biomes and mobs.

Any enquires drop me a message on my TikTok below:

https://www.tiktok.com/@jinkaizenn



HAVE FUN!
